name: Certificate Exported From Local Certificate Store
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Zach Mathis
SIGMA Title: Certificate Exported From Local Certificate Store
SIGMA Description: Detects when an application exports a certificate (and potentially the private key as well) from the local Windows certificate store.

False positives:
- Legitimate application requesting certificate exports will trigger this. Apply additional filters as needed

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=1007 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Certificate Exported From Local Certificate Store on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=1007 AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Certificate Exported From Local Certificate Store
